atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports fatigue.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports fever.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports fatigue for the past four days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports feeling feverish last night.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports sweating.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports difficulty swallowing.

atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a stuffy nose.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports swollen tonsils.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports no stomach pain.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient drinks water primarily.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient occasionally drinks wine.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports blood pressure fluctuations, ranging from 120/80 to 140/80.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports blood sugar fluctuations, ranging from 80-90 in the morning to 140 at night.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient takes metformin 1000mg twice daily with breakfast and dinner.

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports a low-grade fever of 104°F.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes a blood pressure of 130/80 mmHg.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes a heart rate of 84 bpm.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes facial examination reveals no pain upon palpation of the sinuses.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes nasal edema and erythema.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes bilateral exudates in the throat.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes cervical lymphadenopathy on the right side.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes coarse rhonchi at the lung bases that clear with coughing.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician observes a regular heart rhythm without murmurs or rubs.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician diagnoses symptoms consistent with a likely upper respiratory infection.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician suspects possible strep throat.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a rapid strep test.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes amoxicillin 500mg three times daily for 10 days.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes lidocaine swish and swallow.
